# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

import jenkins.model.*
def call() {   // define a method called 'call' to use in pipeline scripting 
    environment{     // set the Jenkins Environment Variables for Pipeline Scripts and Jobs/Pipelines (optional)
        node('master') {}      // specify that this job should run on master Node. Optional, if not specified it will default to 'slave' or first available agent in case of multi-agent builds 
    }  
    
    pipeline {       // define a Pipeline block for Jenkinsfile (optional)
        environment{         // set the Environment Variables inside this scope only affecting current job/pipeline. Optional, if not specified it will default to 'global' or first available agent in case of multi-agent builds 
            node('slave') {     // specify that these jobs should run on slave Node(s) (optional). If no slaves are found Jenkins uses the master as a fallback option  
                stage ('Download Artifact from External URLS and Deploy to Production Servers '){    // define first Stage in Pipeline 
                    steps {     // begin defining Steps for this Staged Job (optional)
                        script{      // start of the Script block where you can use Groovy language features. Optional, if not specified it will default as a global scope  
                            def externalURLs = [ 'http://url1', ‘https//: url2' ]    // define an array with External URLS (replace them by your actual values)    
                            3rdPartyArtifactName.each { artifactUrl ->      // loop through each Artifactory/External Server Url in the list  
                                if(artifacts = sh(returnStdout: true, script: "curl --head ${artifactUrl}").firstLine)  {     // check whether curl command is successful or not. If yes then proceed to download artifact from external URL else skip this iteration   
                                    def fileName="${env.BUILD_NUMBER}-${artifacts}"      // define the name of downloaded Artifact (replace them by your actual values)    
                                    $classpath = "aws s3 cp $fileName aws-bucket/folder/"  // AWS S3 command to download artifact from external URL and upload it into specific folder in bucket. Replace 'aws' with appropriate CLI for you server, replace the path as per your requirement  
                                }     else {      // if curl is not successful then skip this iteration   
                                    echo "Artifact Download Failed: ${artifactUrl}"  // print error message on console (optional)      
                                    $currentBuild.result = 'FAILED'        // set the build result as failed in case of any failure  
                                }    
                            }     
                        }// end script block   
                    }//end steps section        
                }  /* End stage */           
             }/*End pipeline*/      
          }/*END environment scope for Jenkinsfile and Pipeline Scripts. Optional, if not specified it will default to 'global' or first available agent in case of multi-agent builds  
      '''    ) // end code block
